judge.reason: The primary purpose of __cgroup_bpf_detach is not reference-count management; it is a complex function that handles detaching a BPF program/link from a cgroup, involving entry lookup, updating effective programs with error recovery, list deletion, revision increments, and flag resets. The call to bpf_prog_put is only one step within this broader business logic.
